name: CONTRACT-BACKLOG-4
title: rabbit-triage.sh looks for bugs in <feature-dir>/docs/bugs/ but rabbit-bug stores them in .claude/bugs/<feature>/ — contract violation between contract and rabbit-bug

history.note: TDD cycle started for centralized bug path fix
